---
title: 'Story Seed: Earth 2.0'
date: '2016-03-28T04:43:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4002497567345228643'
blogger_filename: '/2016/03/story-seed-earth-20_27.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

<br /><br />After 300 (?) years two cultures develop on opposite continents of Earth 2.0.<br /><br /><br /><br />Darwinism has become a dogmatic religion, but manifested in two cultures (advanced and barbaric).<br /><br /><br />Intelligent Design Science becomes the new threat to the World order, inspiring exploration and rational inquiry.<br /><br /><br /><br />This leads to a greater discovery... they did not develop here naturally, but came from a different planet of origin on a space ship...from Earth 1.0.
